vhs-tape-evangelion-copy_file0.desc:
VHS Tape - Evangelion! - Copy

Video Size: 720x480
Length: 2:03:30

Neon Genesis Evangelion[4] (Japanese: 新世紀エヴァンゲリオン, Hepburn: Shinseiki Evangerion, lit. "New Century Gospel") is a Japanese mecha anime television series produced by Gainax and Tatsunoko Production, directed by Hideaki Anno and broadcast on TV Tokyo from October 1995 to March 1996. The cast included Megumi Ogata as Shinji Ikari, Kotono Mitsuishi as Misato Katsuragi, Megumi Hayashibara as Rei Ayanami, and Yūko Miyamura as Asuka Langley Soryu. Music for the series was composed by Shirō Sagisu.

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Neon_Genesis_Evangelion

nostalgiaetherealcollection_file11.desc:
Welcome to nostalgia central. NostalgiaEthereal's aka The Retro Connoisseur's wide collection of nostalgic content all in one place for everyone caring to go back in time for hours upon hours. VHS recordings ranging from the 90's to 00's, long marathons of obscure television, vintage cartoons and anime, retro drive-in movie projects, TV-movie broadcast recreations, original commercials throughout, Adult Swim-related content, and September 11th-related content. This is a time-machine in the form of a database. As time progresses, more will be added as I acquire more VHS tapes to transfer. So be on the lookout as time moves on for new content uploaded. Archiving these things is HIGHLY important and crucial to preservation of a time period that has long past and must be kept alive through data-hoarding archived media catalogues such as this.
I do not own any of the content shared here. Only for historical preservation and entertainment purposes.

last-stream-on-the-left-tuesday-june-5th.desc: Tonight on Last Stream, the glistening, rugged farmhand prepares to take Titties on his first cattle drive, but can Titties handle all that beef? Meanwhile, The Fish (A.K.A. Matt Harrigan) finally introduces the Devilish Dickies to The Muscle, who turns out to be none other than Adult Swim Digital Enforcer Danya Levine, and they send her to trick The Mouth (A.K.A. Jono) into thinking she wants to defect too, but all The Muscle (A.K.A. Danya Levine) wants is to pierce the boys’ sanctum.
